name: Crafting Table
description: Place 4 wooden planks in a 2x2 square in the inventory crafting grid. Expands the grid to 3x3.

name: Stick
description: Place 2 wooden planks vertically in the crafting grid. Used for tools and torches.

name: Torch
description: Place coal above a stick in the crafting grid. Provides light.

name: Wooden Pickaxe
description: 3 planks across the top row and 2 sticks vertically in the middle column of a crafting table.

name: Stone Pickaxe
description: 3 cobblestone across the top row and 2 sticks vertically in the middle column.

name: Iron Pickaxe
description: 3 iron ingots across the top row and 2 sticks vertically in the middle column.

name: Diamond Pickaxe
description: 3 diamonds across the top row and 2 sticks vertically in the middle column.

name: Wooden Axe
description: 3 planks in top-left, top-middle, and middle-left, plus 2 sticks vertically in middle-right.

name: Stone Axe
description: 3 cobblestone in top-left, top-middle, and middle-left, plus 2 sticks vertically in middle-right.

name: Iron Axe
description: 3 iron ingots in top-left, top-middle, and middle-left, plus 2 sticks vertically in middle-right.

name: Wooden Sword
description: 2 planks in the top-middle and middle-middle, plus 1 stick in the bottom-middle.

name: Stone Sword
description: 2 cobblestone in the top-middle and middle-middle, plus 1 stick in the bottom-middle.

name: Iron Sword
description: 2 iron ingots in the top-middle and middle-middle, plus 1 stick in the bottom-middle.

name: Diamond Sword
description: 2 diamonds in the top-middle and middle-middle, plus 1 stick in the bottom-middle.

name: Bucket
description: 3 iron ingots in a V shape in the crafting grid.

name: Furnace
description: 8 cobblestone around the edge of the crafting grid, leaving the center empty.

name: Chest
description: 8 wooden planks around the edge of the crafting grid, leaving the center empty.

name: Bed
description: 3 wool across the top row and 3 wooden planks across the middle row.

name: Shield
description: 6 wood planks in a Y shape plus an iron ingot in the top-middle.

name: Bow
description: 3 sticks and 3 string arranged in a U shape with string on the right.

name: Arrow
description: Flint on top, stick in middle, feather on bottom.

name: Paper
description: 3 sugar canes horizontally in the crafting grid.

name: Book
description: 3 paper and 1 leather.

name: Bookshelf
description: 3 books in the middle row and 6 wood planks around them.

name: Enchanting Table
description: 4 obsidian on the bottom, 2 diamonds on the sides, 1 book on top.

name: Anvil
description: 3 iron blocks across the top row, 1 iron ingot in the center, 3 iron ingots in a line at the bottom.

name: Iron Helmet
description: 5 iron ingots in an upside-down U shape in the crafting grid.

name: Iron Chestplate
description: 8 iron ingots filling all slots except the top-middle.

name: Iron Leggings
description: 7 iron ingots in a U shape leaving the center and top-middle empty.

name: Iron Boots
description: 4 iron ingots in a U shape leaving the top and middle empty.

name: Compass
description: 4 iron ingots around redstone in the center.

name: Clock
description: 4 gold ingots around redstone in the center.

name: Flint and Steel
description: Flint and iron ingot diagonally in the crafting grid.

name: Glass Bottle
description: 3 glass blocks in a V shape.

name: Brewing Stand
description: 3 cobblestone across the bottom and 1 blaze rod in the center.

name: Cauldron
description: 7 iron ingots in a U shape.

name: Iron Door
description: 6 iron ingots in two vertical columns.

name: Wooden Door
description: 6 wood planks in two vertical columns.

name: Trapdoor
description: 6 wood planks in two rows of three.

name: Fence
description: 4 wood planks and 2 sticks in alternating columns.

name: Fence Gate
description: 2 sticks and 4 wood planks in a gate shape.

name: Ladder
description: 7 sticks in a H shape.

name: Sign
description: 6 wood planks in the top two rows and 1 stick in the bottom-middle.

name: Boat
description: 5 wood planks in a U shape.

name: Minecart
description: 5 iron ingots in a U shape.

name: Rail
description: 6 iron ingots and 1 stick in a zigzag pattern.

name: Powered Rail
description: 6 gold ingots, 1 stick, and 1 redstone.

name: Detector Rail
description: 6 iron ingots, 1 stone pressure plate, and 1 redstone.

name: Hopper
description: 5 iron ingots and 1 chest in a V shape.

name: Dispenser
description: 7 cobblestone, 1 bow, and 1 redstone in a U shape with bow in center.

name: Dropper
description: 7 cobblestone and 1 redstone in a U shape.

name: Piston
description: 3 wood planks, 4 cobblestone, 1 iron ingot, and 1 redstone.

name: Sticky Piston
description: 1 piston and 1 slime ball.

name: Redstone Torch
description: 1 redstone above 1 stick.

name: Redstone Repeater
description: 3 stone blocks, 2 redstone torches, and 1 redstone.

name: Redstone Comparator
description: 3 stone blocks, 3 redstone torches, and 1 nether quartz.

name: Daylight Detector
description: 3 glass, 3 nether quartz, and 3 wood slabs.

name: Observer
description: 6 cobblestone, 2 redstone, and 1 nether quartz.

name: Note Block
description: 8 wood planks around 1 redstone.

name: Jukebox
description: 8 wood planks around 1 diamond.

name: TNT
description: 5 gunpowder in an X and 4 sand around them.

name: Fire Charge
description: 1 coal, 1 gunpowder, and 1 blaze powder.

name: Firework Rocket
description: 1 paper and 1 gunpowder. Add firework stars for effects.

name: Lead
description: 4 string and 1 slime ball.

name: Name Tag
description: Cannot be crafted. Found in chests, fishing, or trading with villagers.

name: Saddle
description: Cannot be crafted. Found in chests, fishing, or trading with villagers.
